strengths: Extensive hands-on backend expertise, including building microservices and event-driven architectures capable of handling millions of requests per second.
Recent practical exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, including work with Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators and agentic workflows.
Strong dedication to engineering craftsmanship, demonstrating deep experience with TDD, CI/CD, and system observability across various tech stacks.
concerns: Completely lacks executive engineering leadership experience; there is no evidence of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ or managing a senior leadership layer.
Missing deep architectural experience in AI-native fintech applications, specifically regarding real-time credit risk, margin optimization, and capital allocation.
No demonstrated track record of structuring governance frameworks for outsourced engineering teams or handling board-level technical communication.
response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly capable Staff Software Engineer with an impressive background in high-throughput distributed systems and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling, he does not fit the profile of a scale-up CTO. The role requires an executive with a proven track record of scaling engineering organizations, governing external partners, and architecting highly specialized, AI-driven financial infrastructure, none of which are demonstrated in his individual-contributor-focused resume.
